bonusTasks.promptTitle: Design a Growth Loop for a D2C Brand
bonusTasks.claudePrompt: I am a PM at a D2C skincare brand in India (₹500–2000 price range, mostly women 22–35 in metro cities). We have 50K monthly orders. Help me design a referral + loyalty growth loop. What is the hook, the reward mechanic, the viral coefficient target, and how do I measure if the loop is working? Give me a concrete implementation plan.
